steps.title: Focus on the Pompeii find
steps.content: The text reports that archaeologists recently discovered a well-preserved thermopolium in Pompeii. It then describes what the site contains and how those objects help researchers understand daily life.

steps.title: Reject unrelated purposes
steps.content: Choice A mentions comparing artworks, but no modern artwork comparison appears. Choice B discusses politics, which is absent. Choice D discusses climate, which is also absent. The text's purpose is to present the recent archaeological discovery. The answer is C.
